description_long: This sports center is a large, multi-story building with a rectangular footprint and a prominent, dark-colored, curved roof structure at its center. The exterior walls are clad in a tan or light brown material, likely brick or concrete, with large, arched window openings along the lower levels and smaller rectangular windows above. Two cylindrical towers with vertical window slits are positioned at opposite corners, adding architectural interest and possibly serving as stairwells or entry features. The roof appears to be a combination of a central, dark, barrel-vaulted section and flat surrounding areas, with some skylights or glass panels visible. The building's facade is symmetrical, with no visible signage, and the main entrance is likely located beneath the central roof, possibly through a set of double doors or a recessed entryway.
description: A large, tan sports center with a curved dark roof, arched windows, and cylindrical corner towers. The facade is symmetrical and features multiple window rows and a prominent central roof structure.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main facade with arched windows, the central curved roof, and one cylindrical tower on the right.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the right side, revealing the cylindrical tower and the building's depth, as well as the flat roof sections.
description_view_2: Rear angled view showing the back facade, the second cylindrical tower, and the continuation of the curved roof.
description_view_3: Side view emphasizing the left facade, arched windows, and the left cylindrical tower.
attribute_entrance_type: Main entrance likely consists of double doors or a recessed entryway beneath the central roof; no revolving or sliding doors visible.
attribute_roof_structure: Central barrel-vaulted (curved) roof in dark material, surrounded by flat roof sections with some skylights or glass panels.
attribute_window_arrangement: Multiple rows of large arched windows on the lower level, with smaller rectangular windows above, arranged symmetrically along the facade.
attribute_architectural_style: Contemporary with elements of institutional and civic architecture, featuring symmetrical facades, arched windows, and cylindrical towers.
